roadmap.title: Limgrave, Weeping Peninsula, and Siofra River
roadmap.description: Accept Melina's invitation, clear Stormveil and Castle Morne, restore Godrick's Great Rune, and light Siofra River's eight flame pillars before leaving the opening regions.

roadmap.title: Liurnia, the Academy, Caria Manor, and Radahn
roadmap.description: Clear Raya Lucaria and Caria Manor, start Ranni's service, visit Ainsel River, take the Ruin-Strewn Precipice route, and defeat Radahn to open Nokron.

roadmap.title: Nokron and Ranni's underground route
roadmap.description: Clear Nokron's achievement bosses, follow Ranni through Nokstella and Lake of Rot, defeat Astel, and finish the Moonlight Altar preparations for her ending.

roadmap.title: Altus Plateau, Volcano Manor, and Leyndell
roadmap.description: Clear Volcano Manor and The Shaded Castle, enter Leyndell with two Great Runes, defeat the capital bosses, clear the sewers, and take Bolt of Gransax before the capital changes.

roadmap.title: Mountaintops, Consecrated Snowfield, and Haligtree
roadmap.description: Defeat Niall for the secret medallion, clear Fire Giant and burn the Erdtree, then use the hidden lift route to defeat Loretta, Malenia, and Mohg, Lord of Blood.

roadmap.title: Deeproot, Farum Azula, Ashen Capital, and collections
roadmap.description: Complete Fia's Deathbed Dream before harming her, clear Farum Azula and Ashen Capital, defeat Placidusax, maximize one armament, and finish all four legendary collections.

roadmap.title: Backed-up ending choices and final completion
roadmap.description: After Elden Beast, preserve the pre-ending save, record Elden Lord and Age of the Stars from separate restores, then accept the Three Fingers for Lord of Frenzied Flame and finish the meta achievement.

achievements.sortReason: Final meta unlock after every other achievement.
achievements.summary: Unlock all other 41 base-game Steam achievements to complete ELDEN RING.

guide.context: Shadow of the Erdtree adds no Steam achievements, so DLC completion is irrelevant to this meta unlock.

steps.text: Finish the three ending routes, every achievement boss, one maximum armament upgrade, and all four legendary collections on the base-game achievement list.
Return to an online Steam session if needed and allow Steam to record the final remaining base-game achievement; the meta achievement should register immediately afterward.

achievements.sortReason: Record from the preserved post-Elden Beast save.
achievements.summary: After defeating Elden Beast without an active Frenzied Flame, choose "Mend the Elden Ring" at Fractured Marika.

guide.context: Any Elden Lord variant awarded by a Mending Rune qualifies, but the Three Fingers' brand hides this choice until Miquella's Needle removes the Frenzied Flame.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Radagon of the Golden Order} and @enemy{Elden Beast}, then activate the @loc{Fractured Marika} Site of Grace without touching the statue or summon sign.
Quit safely and copy the Steam save from %APPDATA%\EldenRing to a separate backup folder before recording any ending.
Interact with @npc{Fractured Marika}, select "Mend the Elden Ring," and watch the ending until the achievement registers.

achievements.description: Achieve the Age of the Stars ending.
achievements.sortReason: Prepare Ranni's route early and record its ending from a restored save.
achievements.summary: Complete Ranni's quest, then use Ranni's blue summon sign after defeating Elden Beast to begin the Age of the Stars.

guide.context: The blue sign appears only after the Dark Moon Ring scene below the Cathedral of Manus Celes; choosing Fractured Marika instead consumes that save state's ending.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Royal Knight Loretta}, speak to @npc{Ranni} at @loc{Ranni's Rise}, accept her service, and exhaust the dialogue with Ranni, Iji, and Seluvis.

Defeat @enemy{Starscourge Radahn}, descend the crater northwest of @loc{Fort Haight West}, cross Nokron past @enemy{Mimic Tear}, and take the @item{Fingerslayer Blade} from the Night's Sacred Ground chest.
Give Ranni the Fingerslayer Blade, use the portal atop @loc{Renna's Rise}, collect @item{Miniature Ranni}, and select "Talk to miniature Ranni" at the nearby grace until she responds.
Defeat the @enemy{Baleful Shadow}, use its @item{Discarded Palace Key} on the chest beside Rennala in @loc{Raya Lucaria Grand Library}, and take the @item{Dark Moon Ring}.
Cross @loc{Lake of Rot}, use the coffin in @loc{Grand Cloister}, defeat @enemy{Astel, Naturalborn of the Void}, and give Ranni the Dark Moon Ring below @loc{Cathedral of Manus Celes}.
After defeating Elden Beast, activate Ranni's blue summon sign in front of Fractured Marika and watch the Age of the Stars ending until the achievement registers.

achievements.description: Achieve the Lord of Frenzied Flame ending.
achievements.sortReason: Take the Three Fingers only after preserving the other ending choices.
achievements.summary: Accept the Three Fingers below Leyndell, then touch Fractured Marika after Elden Beast to begin the Lord of Frenzied Flame.

guide.context: Opening the red door suppresses the Elden Lord and Age of the Stars choices on that save; preserve a post-Elden Beast backup before accepting the brand.

steps.text: Enter @loc{Subterranean Shunning-Grounds} beneath Leyndell, reach @loc{Cathedral of the Forsaken}, and defeat @enemy{Mohg, the Omen}.
Strike the altar behind Mohg's arena, descend the hidden beams and stone coffins to the bottom, and activate the @loc{Frenzied Flame Proscription} Site of Grace.
Remove every equipped armor piece, then open the red door to receive the @mechanic{Three Fingers' Frenzied Flame}; weapons and talismans may remain equipped.
After Elden Beast is dead, interact with @npc{Fractured Marika} and watch the Lord of Frenzied Flame ending until the achievement registers.

achievements.sortReason: Opening-region Shardbearer and source of the simplest Great Rune route.
achievements.summary: Reach Stormveil Castle's final courtyard and defeat Godrick the Grafted.

guide.context: Godrick is the recommended first Shardbearer; his Great Rune also provides the shortest route to the separate Great Rune achievement.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Margit, the Fell Omen}, enter @loc{Stormveil Castle}, and follow either Gatekeeper Gostoc's side route or the opened main gate through the castle.
Enter the fog gate beyond @loc{Secluded Cell} and defeat @enemy{Godrick the Grafted} through both phases to receive Godrick's Great Rune and the achievement.

achievements.sortReason: Defeat after starting Ranni's route to open Nokron.
achievements.summary: Start the Radahn Festival at Redmane Castle and defeat Starscourge Radahn in Wailing Dunes.

guide.context: Radahn's defeat permanently opens the Nokron crater northwest of Fort Haight West, enabling Ranni's quest and several underground achievements.

steps.text: Travel to @loc{Impassable Greatbridge} in Caelid and use the active waygate, or cross into @loc{Redmane Castle} manually if the festival portal is inactive.
Speak to @npc{Jerren} above the plaza, say that you are ready, pass through the church, ride the elevator down, and use the beach teleporter.
Use the gold summon signs in @loc{Wailing Dunes} as desired and defeat @enemy{Starscourge Radahn}; the achievement registers after the victory scene.

achievements.sortReason: Leyndell story boss that opens the Mountaintops.
achievements.summary: Climb Leyndell to the Elden Throne and defeat Morgott, the Omen King.

guide.context: Morgott is Leyndell's final mandatory boss and supplies the Rold Medallion needed to enter Mountaintops of the Giants.

steps.text: Acquire two Great Runes, defeat the @enemy{Draconic Tree Sentinel} at Leyndell's northeastern gate, and enter @loc{Leyndell, Royal Capital}.
Climb the capital through @loc{Erdtree Sanctuary}, defeat @enemy{Godfrey's golden shade}, and continue along the roots to @loc{Queen's Bedchamber} and @loc{Elden Throne}.
Defeat @enemy{Morgott, the Omen King}, examine the sealed thorns, then rest at the new grace and speak with Melina to receive the Rold Medallion.

achievements.sortReason: Clear with Volcano Manor while the route is active.
achievements.summary: Reach Volcano Manor's audience chamber, use the Serpent-Hunter, and defeat Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy.

guide.context: The Serpent-Hunter lying inside the arena has no stat requirement and gains a special long-range attack for both phases of this encounter.

steps.text: Join @loc{Volcano Manor}, take the @item{Drawing-Room Key} from Tanith, open the first room on the right-hand corridor, and roll into the illusory wall to enter Prison Town.
Traverse Prison Town and @loc{Temple of Eiglay} to the audience-path teleporter, or complete Tanith's three assassination requests and accept her teleport offer.
Pick up and equip @item{Serpent-Hunter} beside the arena entrance, defeat the God-Devouring Serpent, then defeat @enemy{Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy}.

achievements.sortReason: Late optional Haligtree boss; overlevel or return after the ending if needed.
achievements.summary: Open Miquella's Haligtree with the secret medallion, descend through Elphael, and defeat Malenia, Blade of Miquella.

guide.context: Malenia is optional and can be postponed until after an ending; Loretta must be defeated before Elphael becomes reachable.

steps.text: Reveal @npc{Albus} near @loc{Village of the Albinaurics} for Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right), then defeat @enemy{Commander Niall} and take Haligtree Secret Medallion (Left) beyond his @loc{Castle Sol} arena.

At @loc{Grand Lift of Rold}, switch the prompt to "Hoist secret medallion," enter Consecrated Snowfield, solve @loc{Ordina, Liturgical Town} by lighting all four Evergaol statues, and use the unlocked portal.
Cross @loc{Miquella's Haligtree}, win the @enemy{Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree} encounter, descend through @loc{Elphael}, and activate @loc{Haligtree Roots}.
Defeat @enemy{Malenia, Blade of Miquella} and her Goddess of Rot second phase; the achievement registers when the victory message appears.

achievements.sortReason: Use the Consecrated Snowfield teleporter while clearing hidden regions.
achievements.summary: Use the Consecrated Snowfield's blood-stained teleporter, cross Mohgwyn Palace, and defeat Mohg, Lord of Blood.

guide.context: This Shardbearer is a different boss from Mohg, the Omen in Leyndell's sewers; only Lord of Blood awards this achievement.

steps.text: Assemble the Haligtree Secret Medallion and select "Hoist secret medallion" at @loc{Grand Lift of Rold} to enter @loc{Consecrated Snowfield}.
Find the blood-stained waygate on the western snowfield, use it to enter @loc{Mohgwyn Palace}, and climb through the blood marsh and mausoleum to @loc{Dynasty Mausoleum Midpoint}.
Enter the summit arena and defeat @enemy{Mohg, Lord of Blood}; survive or counter his phase-transition blood ritual and empty his health bar.

achievements.sortReason: Mandatory Farum Azula boss; collect Bolt of Gransax first.
achievements.summary: Pass the Godskin Duo in Crumbling Farum Azula and defeat Beast Clergyman's Maliketh phase.

guide.context: Maliketh's defeat transforms Leyndell into Ashen Capital and removes Bolt of Gransax from its original capital location.

steps.text: Before this fight, collect @item{Bolt of Gransax} from the giant spear below @loc{Erdtree Sanctuary} if the Legendary Armaments achievement is unfinished.
Defeat @enemy{Godskin Duo}, continue through @loc{Crumbling Farum Azula}, and pass the mounted sentinel outside @loc{Beside the Great Bridge}.
Defeat @enemy{Beast Clergyman} until the phase change, then defeat @enemy{Maliketh, the Black Blade}; the achievement registers before the Ashen Capital cutscene.

achievements.sortReason: Final mandatory boss before Radagon and Elden Beast.
achievements.summary: Climb Leyndell, Ashen Capital to the Elden Throne and defeat Godfrey's Hoarah Loux phase.

guide.context: This is the physical Godfrey encounter immediately before Radagon, not the earlier golden shade that has its own achievement.

steps.text: After defeating @enemy{Maliketh}, cross @loc{Leyndell, Ashen Capital}, defeat Sir Gideon Ofnir, and climb to @loc{Queen's Bedchamber}.
Enter @loc{Elden Throne}, defeat @enemy{Godfrey, First Elden Lord} through the phase change, then empty @enemy{Hoarah Loux, Warrior}'s health bar.

achievements.sortReason: Optional Farum Azula boss and Frenzied Flame cure location.
achievements.summary: Lie down at the empty grave below Beside the Great Bridge and defeat Dragonlord Placidusax.

guide.context: Placidusax is optional; the time-frozen arena is also the only location where Miquella's Needle can remove the Frenzied Flame.

steps.text: From @loc{Beside the Great Bridge}, ride the elevator down, exit the building, walk to the cliff edge, and descend the successive rock platforms toward the tornado.
Approach the empty grave among the skeletons on the lowest platform and select "Lie down" to enter @loc{Dragonlord Placidusax's arena}.
Defeat @enemy{Dragonlord Placidusax}; the achievement registers when the boss health bar is emptied.

achievements.description: Upgraded any armament to its highest stage
achievements.sortReason: Use a final-tier smithing stone collected during late-route cleanup.
achievements.summary: Ask Smithing Master Hewg to upgrade one normal armament to +25 or one special armament to +10.

guide.context: Normal and special armaments use separate stone families; only the final Ancient Dragon or Somber Ancient Dragon tier triggers the achievement.

steps.text: Choose one armament and keep upgrading the same weapon with Smithing Stones for a normal weapon or Somber Smithing Stones for a special weapon.
Obtain an @item{Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone} for +25 or a @item{Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone} for +10; the Haligtree route supplies a Somber final-tier stone.
At @loc{Roundtable Hold}, select "Strengthen armament" with @npc{Smithing Master Hewg} and buy the final +25 or +10 upgrade.

achievements.sortReason: Collect Bolt of Gransax before Maliketh, then finish the remaining nine-item set.
achievements.summary: Hold all nine required legendary armaments on one character, including Bolt of Gransax before Maliketh changes Leyndell.

guide.context: Weapons and talismans can be traded, but the safest offline route obtains every weapon directly; if the counter stalls, move all nine between inventory and grace storage.

collectibles.name: Devourer's Scepter
collectibles.method: Defeat @npc{Bernahl} at Warmaster's Shack, or complete his Volcano Manor progress and defeat his invasion down the ladder opposite @loc{Beside the Great Bridge}.

collectibles.name: Grafted Blade Greatsword
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Leonine Misbegotten} on the beach behind Castle Morne and collect the boss reward.

collectibles.name: Sword of Night and Flame
collectibles.method: From @loc{Manor Lower Level}, follow the walls, drop to the roof before the third tower, drop again to the laddered roof, climb down, and open the chest.

collectibles.name: Ruins Greatsword
collectibles.method: After Radahn, exhaust Jerren's church dialogue, reload the castle, and defeat the @enemy{Misbegotten Warrior} and @enemy{Crucible Knight} duo in the plaza.

collectibles.name: Marais Executioner's Sword
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Elemer of the Briar} in the castle's top-floor arena.

collectibles.name: Bolt of Gransax
collectibles.method: From @loc{Erdtree Sanctuary}, descend the west elevator, follow the path, vault the left railing onto the giant golden spear, and climb to the weapon.
collectibles.note: Collect this before defeating Maliketh; Ashen Capital removes the pickup.

collectibles.name: Eclipse Shotel
collectibles.method: Pick up the weapon from the altar beside the Church of the Eclipse Site of Grace.

collectibles.name: Golden Order Greatsword
collectibles.method: Spend two Stonesword Keys to break the cave's imp seal, then enter and defeat @enemy{Misbegotten Crusader}.

collectibles.name: Dark Moon Greatsword
collectibles.method: Complete Ranni's quest through Astel and give Ranni the Dark Moon Ring; take the weapon where Ranni disappears.

achievements.sortReason: Finish the six-item set after Ranni and Haligtree access are complete.
achievements.summary: Collect the six legendary Spirit Ashes, ending with Finlay in Elphael and Tiche on Moonlight Altar.

guide.context: Legendary Spirit Ashes cannot be dropped by another player, and the late pair requires both the Haligtree and Ranni's Moonlight Altar route.

collectibles.name: Lhutel the Headless
collectibles.method: Lower and ride the flame pillar to the lever, open the boss door, and defeat @enemy{Cemetery Shade}.

collectibles.name: Redmane Knight Ogha
collectibles.method: After Radahn, enter the catacombs at the far northern edge of his arena and defeat @enemy{Putrid Tree Spirit}.

collectibles.name: Mimic Tear Ashes
collectibles.method: From @loc{Ancestral Woods}, cross the rooftops into the chapel, spend a Stonesword Key on the imp-sealed room, and open the chest.

collectibles.name: Ancient Dragon Knight Kristoff
collectibles.method: Use the floor's circle of light to make the shadow guardian vulnerable, open the boss gate, and defeat @enemy{Ancient Hero of Zamor}.

collectibles.name: Cleanrot Knight Finlay
collectibles.method: From @loc{Prayer Room}, descend the forward route, drop from the balcony to the right-hand arch and pagoda plaza, then open the chest in the guarded side room.

collectibles.name: Black Knife Tiche
collectibles.method: Complete Ranni's route through Astel, enter the evergaol on Moonlight Altar, and defeat @enemy{Alecto, Black Knife Ringleader}.

achievements.description: Acquired all legendary sorceries and incantations
achievements.sortReason: Finish the seven-spell set after Sellen, Deeproot, Mountaintops, and Moonlight Altar are open.
achievements.summary: Collect all seven legendary spells across Liurnia, Caelid, Gelmir, Deeproot, Mountaintops, and Moonlight Altar.

guide.context: These sorceries and incantations cannot be traded; Stars of Ruin depends on Comet Azur and Sellen, while Ranni's Dark Moon depends on completing Ranni's underground route.

collectibles.name: Flame of the Fell God
collectibles.method: Reach the plateau above Liurnia Lake Shore and defeat @enemy{Adan, Thief of Fire}.

collectibles.name: Greyoll's Roar
collectibles.method: Kill @enemy{Elder Dragon Greyoll} near Fort Faroth, then spend three Dragon Hearts on Greyoll's Roar at the Cathedral altar.

collectibles.name: Comet Azur
collectibles.method: Ride beyond Hermit Village to the Primeval Sorcerer Azur grace and speak to @npc{Azur} until he gives the spell.

collectibles.name: Stars of Ruin
collectibles.method: Show Comet Azur to @npc{Sellen} at Waypoint Ruins, accept her request for the Sellian Sealbreaker, reveal Sellia Hideaway's illusory cliff wall, and use the key on @npc{Master Lusat}'s seal.

collectibles.name: Elden Stars
collectibles.method: Use the coffin after Valiant Gargoyles, climb the right-hand roots from the Deeproot entrance, follow the left route through the ant cave, and collect the spell at the exit.

collectibles.name: Founding Rain of Stars
collectibles.method: Start from the cliff across the canyon, follow the faint mist across the invisible bridge into Heretical Rise, and open the top-floor chest.

collectibles.name: Ranni's Dark Moon
collectibles.method: Examine the imp statue, find the three great wise beasts around Moonlight Altar without fast travelling, then climb the opened tower and take the spell.

achievements.sortReason: Finish the eight-item set after Maliketh transforms Leyndell.
achievements.summary: Collect the eight legendary talismans, including the post-Maliketh Erdtree's Favor +2 in Ashen Capital.

guide.context: Talismans can be traded, but direct collection spans the Academy, Nokstella, Farum Azula, Elphael, and the capital's post-Maliketh state.

collectibles.name: Radagon Icon
collectibles.method: From @loc{Debate Parlor}, exit forward, turn right around the corner, jump to the balcony, climb the ladder, and open the chest.

collectibles.name: Radagon's Soreseal
collectibles.method: Climb to the roof, drop through the last opening, pass the spectral enemy and bats, jump to the right-hand ledge, and collect the talisman.

collectibles.name: Godfrey Icon
collectibles.method: Enter the southern Altus evergaol and defeat @enemy{Godefroy the Grafted}.

collectibles.name: Moon of Nokstella
collectibles.method: During Ranni's route, climb to Nokstella's highest western chamber and open the chest beneath the giant throne.

collectibles.name: Old Lord's Talisman
collectibles.method: From @loc{Beside the Great Bridge}, walk away from Maliketh's bridge, descend the ladder, and open the chest at the path's end.

collectibles.name: Marika's Soreseal
collectibles.method: Descend from @loc{Prayer Room} to Elphael's bottom, spend a Stonesword Key on the imp-sealed doorway, and take the talisman from the altar.

collectibles.name: Dragoncrest Greatshield Talisman
collectibles.method: From @loc{Drainage Channel}, cross the roots, drop through the chapel roof, and open the balcony chest.

collectibles.name: Erdtree's Favor +2
collectibles.method: After Maliketh, approach the capital from @loc{Forbidden Lands}, ride the lift down, cross the ash-covered courtyard, and take the talisman from the dead tree.

achievements.displayName: Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon
achievements.description: Defeat Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon.
achievements.sortReason: Clear Raya Lucaria before beginning the underground Ranni route.
achievements.summary: Use the Academy Glintstone Key, cross Raya Lucaria, and defeat Rennala in the Grand Library.

guide.context: Rennala's Great Rune enables rebirth but cannot be restored at a Divine Tower; her library chest becomes important later in Ranni's quest.

steps.text: Take the @item{Academy Glintstone Key} from the corpse behind Glintstone Dragon Smarag west of Academy Gate Town, then use the key at @loc{South Raya Lucaria Gate}.
Traverse @loc{Academy of Raya Lucaria}, defeat @enemy{Red Wolf of Radagon}, and continue across the courtyard rooftops to @loc{Raya Lucaria Grand Library}.
Break the golden students' auras to end the first phase, then empty @enemy{Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon}'s health bar in the moonlit second phase.

achievements.sortReason: Enter Fia's Deathbed Dream before attacking her or completing cleanup.
achievements.summary: Give Fia the Cursemark of Death in Deeproot Depths, enter her Deathbed Dream, and defeat Lichdragon Fortissax.

guide.context: Attacking Fia before entering the dream permanently removes this fight from the current journey.

steps.text: Give Ranni the Fingerslayer Blade, take her @item{Carian Inverted Statue}, place it on the altar at @loc{Carian Study Hall}, traverse the inverted hall, and collect @item{Cursemark of Death} atop @loc{Divine Tower of Liurnia}.
Defeat @enemy{Valiant Gargoyles}, use the coffin beside @loc{Great Waterfall Basin}, cross @loc{Deeproot Depths} to @loc{Across the Roots}, and defeat Fia's Champions.
Speak to @npc{Fia} and choose "No, I want to be Held," choose "Talk in Secret" twice, then choose "Give Cursemark of Death."
Reload the area and exhaust Fia's dialogue until she sleeps. Interact with Fia, answer "Yes" when asked about the @loc{Deathbed Dream}, and overcome @enemy{Lichdragon Fortissax}.

achievements.sortReason: Mandatory Farum Azula encounter before Maliketh.
achievements.summary: Follow Crumbling Farum Azula's mandatory route and empty the Godskin Duo's shared health bar.

guide.context: Each Godskin can respawn while shared health remains, so defeating one body does not end the encounter.

steps.text: After burning the Erdtree, traverse @loc{Crumbling Farum Azula} until the @loc{Dragon Temple Transept} or @loc{Dragon Temple} approach reaches the boss fog.
Defeat @enemy{Godskin Apostle} and @enemy{Godskin Noble} as many times as needed until the shared Godskin Duo health bar reaches zero.

achievements.sortReason: Mandatory Mountaintops boss before the Forge.
achievements.summary: Reach the southeastern Mountaintops arena and defeat Fire Giant to open the Forge of the Giants.

guide.context: Fire Giant is the final boss before the Forge; the achievement does not require burning the Erdtree, which is a separate interaction afterward.

steps.text: Use the Rold Medallion at @loc{Grand Lift of Rold}, cross Mountaintops of the Giants to @loc{Foot of the Forge}, and enter the southeastern arena across either chain.
Damage @enemy{Fire Giant}'s braced ankle in phase one, survive the phase change, and empty his remaining health bar to register the achievement.

achievements.sortReason: Clear the western Ainsel River branch while exploring Liurnia.
achievements.summary: Enter Ainsel River from eastern Liurnia and defeat Dragonkin Soldier of Nokstella below the giant throne.

guide.context: This western Ainsel River branch is separate from Ranni's later Ainsel River Main route and from Siofra's non-achievement Dragonkin Soldier.

steps.text: Ride the lift at @loc{Ainsel River Well} in eastern Liurnia and follow the underground river through @loc{Ainsel River Sluice Gate}.
Continue west to the cavern beneath the giant seated figure and defeat @enemy{Dragonkin Soldier of Nokstella}.

achievements.sortReason: Light Nokron's six pillars during the Ranni route.
achievements.summary: Light Nokron's six Ancestral Woods pillars, touch the Hallowhorn remains, and defeat Regal Ancestor Spirit.

guide.context: Regal Ancestor Spirit uses six pillars in Nokron; Siofra River's separate Ancestor Spirit uses eight.

steps.text: After defeating Mimic Tear, explore @loc{Ancestral Woods} and ignite all six stone flame pillars marked by obelisks.
Go to Nokron's @loc{Hallowhorn Grounds}, interact with the glowing horned remains, and enter the ancestral memory.
Defeat @enemy{Regal Ancestor Spirit}; continue attacking after each self-heal until its health bar is empty.

achievements.sortReason: Clear Siofra Aqueduct to open Deeproot Depths.
achievements.summary: Follow the jellyfish into Nokron's Siofra Aqueduct and defeat both Valiant Gargoyles.

guide.context: The victory opens a coffin beside Great Waterfall Basin that transports the player to Deeproot Depths and Fia's achievement route.

steps.text: From northern @loc{Ancestral Woods}, follow the spectral jellyfish to the cliff drop and descend into @loc{Siofra Aqueduct}.
Cross the aqueduct past the Crucible Knight and continue to the waterfall basin boss arena.
Defeat the first @enemy{Valiant Gargoyle} quickly when possible, then defeat the twinblade gargoyle and empty the shared encounter health.

achievements.sortReason: Opening Stormveil boss.
achievements.summary: Follow Stormhill's main road to Castleward Tunnel and defeat Margit at Stormveil's gate.

guide.context: Stormveil can be bypassed into Liurnia, but bypassing the castle does not award this boss achievement.

steps.text: From @loc{Gatefront}, follow the northwest road through Stormgate and Stormhill to @loc{Castleward Tunnel}.
Enter the fog gate and defeat @enemy{Margit, the Fell Omen}; the achievement registers when the victory message appears.

achievements.description: Defeat the Red Wolf of Radagon.
achievements.sortReason: Academy midpoint before Rennala.
achievements.summary: Cross Raya Lucaria from Schoolhouse Classroom and defeat Red Wolf of Radagon in Debate Parlor.

guide.context: The Red Wolf blocks both Rennala's route and the nearby Radagon Icon legendary talisman.

steps.text: Use the @item{Academy Glintstone Key} at @loc{South Raya Lucaria Gate} and traverse the academy to @loc{Schoolhouse Classroom}.
Climb through the school halls, enter @loc{Debate Parlor}, and defeat @enemy{Red Wolf of Radagon}.

achievements.sortReason: Temple of Eiglay boss on the Rykard route.
achievements.summary: Open Volcano Manor's Prison Town route and defeat Godskin Noble at the Temple of Eiglay.

guide.context: Godskin Noble blocks the direct dungeon route to Rykard's audience teleporter; Tanith's assassination route can skip this path but not this achievement.

steps.text: Take Tanith's @item{Drawing-Room Key}, open the first room on Volcano Manor's right-hand corridor, and reveal the illusory wall inside.
Traverse @loc{Prison Town}, raise the bridge beside @loc{Temple of Eiglay}, enter the temple, and defeat @enemy{Godskin Noble}.

achievements.sortReason: Use the Ruin-Strewn Precipice route into Altus Plateau.
achievements.summary: Climb Ruin-Strewn Precipice from northern Liurnia and defeat Magma Wyrm Makar at the Overlook.

guide.context: This boss route reaches Altus Plateau without assembling the Dectus Medallion, but the fight remains optional for normal story progression.

steps.text: Enter @loc{Ravine-Veiled Village} at Liurnia's northern ravine and climb the ladders, tunnels, and lifts through @loc{Ruin-Strewn Precipice}.
Enter the arena at @loc{Ruin-Strewn Precipice Overlook} and defeat @enemy{Magma Wyrm Makar}; take the lift beyond the arena into Altus Plateau.

achievements.sortReason: Mandatory Leyndell shade before Morgott.
achievements.summary: Climb Leyndell to Erdtree Sanctuary and defeat Godfrey's golden shade.

guide.context: This spectral fight is distinct from the late physical Godfrey encounter that changes into Hoarah Loux.

steps.text: From @loc{West Capital Rampart}, climb the giant dragon wing and roots toward the upper capital and @loc{Erdtree Sanctuary}.
Enter the sanctuary and defeat the golden shade of @enemy{Godfrey, First Elden Lord}; the achievement registers after the shade disappears.

achievements.sortReason: Clear the Leyndell sewers but delay the Three Fingers until ending cleanup.
achievements.summary: Descend Leyndell's well into the Subterranean Shunning-Grounds and defeat Mohg, the Omen.

guide.context: The altar behind Mohg hides the Three Fingers route; clear the boss now, but delay opening the final red door until the other ending saves are preserved.

steps.text: From @loc{Avenue Balcony}, descend the stairs, pass through the door, turn left, vault the railing, and drop into the well below the dragon's foot.
Traverse @loc{Subterranean Shunning-Grounds} through the pipe network and lift route until reaching @loc{Forsaken Depths}.
Enter @loc{Cathedral of the Forsaken} and defeat @enemy{Mohg, the Omen}; the achievement registers before the hidden altar route.

achievements.sortReason: First Nokron boss after Radahn.
achievements.summary: Descend Radahn's crater into Nokron and defeat Mimic Tear on the city's bridge.

guide.context: The encounter copies the player's equipped build when the fight begins and blocks the route to Ancestral Woods and Night's Sacred Ground.

steps.text: After Radahn, descend the floating-rock crater northwest of @loc{Fort Haight West} and follow the rooftops into @loc{Nokron, Eternal City}.
Cross the ruined city to the bridge fog gate and defeat @enemy{Mimic Tear}; continue across the bridge after the achievement registers.

achievements.description: Defeat Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree.
achievements.sortReason: Mandatory Haligtree boss before Elphael and Malenia.
achievements.summary: Solve Ordina, traverse Miquella's Haligtree, and defeat Loretta at Haligtree Promenade.

guide.context: Loretta is mandatory for entry into Elphael and therefore also blocks Malenia and two late legendary collectibles.

steps.text: Use the Haligtree Secret Medallion at @loc{Grand Lift of Rold}, reach @loc{Ordina, Liturgical Town}, enter its Evergaol, and light all four statues to activate the portal.
Use Ordina's portal and traverse the branches and town of @loc{Miquella's Haligtree} until reaching @loc{Haligtree Town Plaza}.
Enter @loc{Haligtree Promenade} and defeat @enemy{Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree}.

achievements.description: Defeat Astel, Naturalborn of the Void.
achievements.sortReason: Finish Lake of Rot during Ranni's route.
achievements.summary: Cross Lake of Rot, use Grand Cloister's coffin, and defeat Astel, Naturalborn of the Void.

guide.context: Astel is part of Ranni's route; the seal beyond the arena opens only while carrying the Dark Moon Ring from Rennala's chest.

steps.text: Defeat the @enemy{Baleful Shadow}, descend to @loc{Lake of Rot}, cross the scarlet-rot lake, and enter @loc{Grand Cloister}.
Descend Grand Cloister to the rot river and interact with the stone coffin in the left corner to travel to Astel's arena.
Defeat @enemy{Astel, Naturalborn of the Void}; carry the Dark Moon Ring through the opened seal to continue toward Moonlight Altar.

achievements.sortReason: Early Weeping Peninsula boss and legendary-armament source.
achievements.summary: Descend through Castle Morne to the southern beach and defeat Leonine Misbegotten.

guide.context: The boss drops Grafted Blade Greatsword, so this fight also completes one ninth of the Legendary Armaments checklist.

steps.text: Enter @loc{Castle Morne}, climb the courtyard ladder and ramparts, then descend the rear towers and cliffs toward @loc{Beside the Rampart Gaol}.
Cross the bridge to the beach fog gate and defeat @enemy{Leonine Misbegotten}; collect @item{Grafted Blade Greatsword} from the victory reward.

achievements.sortReason: Opens Three Sisters and Ranni's Rise.
achievements.summary: Traverse Caria Manor and defeat Royal Knight Loretta at Royal Moongazing Grounds.

guide.context: Loretta guards Three Sisters; defeating her is required before Ranni's Rise and the Age of the Stars route become accessible.

steps.text: Enter @loc{Caria Manor} in northwestern Liurnia and follow the lower gardens, upper walkways, and stairs beyond @loc{Manor Upper Level}.
Enter @loc{Royal Moongazing Grounds} and defeat @enemy{Royal Knight Loretta}; leave through the rear door into Three Sisters.

achievements.sortReason: Altus optional boss and legendary-armament source.
achievements.summary: Climb The Shaded Castle's inner keep and defeat Elemer of the Briar on the top floor.

guide.context: Elemer is optional for progression but drops Marais Executioner's Sword, one of the nine legendary armaments.

steps.text: Travel to @loc{The Shaded Castle} in northern Altus Plateau and cross the poison courtyard and ramparts to @loc{Shaded Castle Inner Gate}.
Climb the inner keep to the top-floor dining hall and defeat @enemy{Elemer of the Briar}; collect @item{Marais Executioner's Sword}.

achievements.sortReason: Clear Siofra River's eight-pillar encounter during early exploration.
achievements.summary: Light Siofra River's eight flame pillars, touch the Hallowhorn remains, and defeat Ancestor Spirit.

guide.context: This Siofra River memory uses eight pillars; Nokron's later Regal Ancestor Spirit uses a separate group of six.

steps.text: Ride @loc{Siofra River Well} in eastern Limgrave and take the large lift from the lower river to @loc{Siofra River Bank}.
Explore the river basin and ignite all eight stone flame pillars marked by obelisks.
Interact with the glowing horned remains at @loc{Hallowhorn Grounds}, enter the ancestral memory, and defeat @enemy{Ancestor Spirit}.

achievements.sortReason: Obtain the Haligtree Secret Medallion half after the fight.
achievements.summary: Traverse Castle Sol, defeat Commander Niall, and open the route to the left secret-medallion half.

guide.context: The Haligtree Secret Medallion (Left) lies beyond Niall and is required for Consecrated Snowfield, Mohg, Loretta, and Malenia.

steps.text: Enter @loc{Castle Sol} in northern Mountaintops of the Giants and traverse the courtyard, church, and rooftop route to the summit fog gate.
Defeat @enemy{Commander Niall} and his summoned knights; the achievement registers when Niall's health reaches zero.
Continue past the arena, ride the lift to the tower roof, and collect @item{Haligtree Secret Medallion (Left)} from the spirit.

achievements.sortReason: First hub unlock after meeting Melina.
achievements.summary: Meet Melina at Gatefront, then accept her invitation to travel to Roundtable Hold at a Site of Grace.

guide.context: Roundtable Hold is the main hub and contains Smithing Master Hewg, whose upgrade menu is required for a maximum-level armament.

steps.text: Rest at @loc{Gatefront} or another qualifying Limgrave Site of Grace, accept @npc{Melina}'s accord, and receive the Spectral Steed Whistle.
Reach or challenge @enemy{Margit, the Fell Omen}, rest at a Site of Grace when Melina appears again, and accept her offer to take you to @loc{Roundtable Hold}.

achievements.description: Restore the power of a Great Rune.
achievements.sortReason: Restore Godrick's Great Rune immediately after Stormveil.
achievements.summary: After defeating Godrick, restore Godrick's Great Rune atop the Divine Tower of Limgrave.

guide.context: Rennala's Great Rune has no tower activation and does not satisfy this unlock; Godrick's tower is the earliest straightforward option.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Godrick the Grafted} in Stormveil Castle and receive @item{Godrick's Great Rune}.
Travel to @loc{Limgrave Tower Bridge} inside Stormveil, cross the bridge past the golems, and use the waygate at the broken end.
Enter @loc{Divine Tower of Limgrave}, ride the lift to the summit, and interact with the rune between the Two Fingers to restore Godrick's Great Rune.

achievements.description: Use kindling to set the Erdtree aflame.
achievements.sortReason: Mandatory story interaction at Forge of the Giants.
achievements.summary: After defeating Fire Giant, choose "Talk to Melina" at Forge of the Giants and accept the cardinal sin.

guide.context: The cutscene moves the player to Crumbling Farum Azula; Bolt of Gransax is safest to collect before this point and becomes unavailable after Maliketh.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Fire Giant}, cross the chain behind his arena, and follow the left rim of @loc{Forge of the Giants} to its Site of Grace.
Rest at the grace, choose "Talk to Melina," select "I'm ready," and accept the cardinal sin; the Erdtree-burning cutscene registers the achievement.
